known_limitations: Minimal reproducer of Midas Capital read-only reentrancy via Curve WMATIC-stMATIC
Citation: https://rekt.news/midas-capital-rekt/ — Midas Capital loses $660K to read-only reentrancy (Jan 15 2023, Polygon)
NOTE: The June 2023 Midas incident was a rounding bug — NOT this class. This is the January 2023 Curve LP reentrancy.
Vulnerable pattern: Curve LP price read AFTER ERC20 transfer callback — stale during reentrancy
Critical action gated by state: depositAndBorrow() against inflated LP price
